basic_details.job_title: NIT Kurukshetra Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Kurukshetra (NIT Kurukshetra) Research Associate Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of NIT Kurukshetra. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the NIT Kurukshetra Research Associate Recruitment 2026. Candidates as per the norms of the Government of India who have B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Production Engineering or equivalent or MBA in Operations Management are eligible to apply for these Research Associate vacancies. The application process for NIT Kurukshetra Research Associate Recruitment 2026 has started and wi

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Production Engineering or equivalent, MBA in Operations Management
qualification.details: B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Production Engineering or equivalent or MBA in Operations Management with a minimum Cumulative Grade Point Average (CGPA) of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or 60% marks in aggregate or equivalent. Desirable: Relevant research/industrial experience, GATE/NET score card (qualified at any time).

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Online Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NIT Kurukshetra Research Associate Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 15-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Associate position at NIT Kurukshetra?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 15-05-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech./B.E./M.Tech./M.E. in Mechanical/Production Engineering or equivalent, or an MBA in Operations Management. A minimum CGPA of 6.5 on a 10-point scale or 60% marks is required.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of INR 40,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Research Associate position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate position at NIT Kurukshetra.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age limit specified for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify a minimum or maximum age limit. However, age relaxation will be provided as per the norms of the Government of India.

faq.question: Q8. What is the mode of application for this job?
faq.answer: The application process is through email. Candidates need to send their application and required documents to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be attached with the application?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs with their application.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to read it thoroughly before applying.
